Cannot use process.env on the client without NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix
body:
Environment variables without the `NEXT_PUBLIC_` prefix are only available on the server. Accessing them in Client Components returns `undefined`.

```tsx
// .env.local
DATABASE_URL=postgres://...
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.example.com

// Server Component — both work
const dbUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL; // OK
const apiUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL; // OK

// Client Component — only NEXT_PUBLIC_ works
'use client';
const dbUrl = process.env.DATABASE_URL; // undefined!
const apiUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL; // OK
```

Never prefix sensitive values like database URLs or API secrets with `NEXT_PUBLIC_` — they get bundled into the client JavaScript. If a Client Component needs server-only data, fetch it via a Server Action or API route.
